# @form-eng/core

> UI-library agnostic React library for rendering configuration-driven forms with a built-in rules engine. Depends only on React and react-hook-form.

- Docs: [README](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/tree/main/packages/core/README.md)
- Agent instructions: [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/tree/main/packages/core/AGENTS.md)
- npm: [@form-eng/core](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@form-eng/core)
- License: MIT

## API Surface

### Providers
- `RulesEngineProvider` -- React context provider owning rules engine state via useReducer
- `UseRulesEngineContext` -- Hook to access rules engine state
- `InjectedFieldProvider` -- Component injection registry provider
- `UseInjectedFieldContext` -- Hook to access injected field registry

### Components
- `FormEngine` -- Main form component (react-hook-form, auto-save with AbortController/retry/timeout, rules engine orchestration). Props include `saveTimeoutMs` (default 30s), `maxSaveRetries` (default 3), `formErrors` (form-level error banner)
- `FormFields` -- Ordered field list rendering
- `RenderField` -- Per-field routing with Controller integration (useMemo, async validation wired with AbortController)
- `FieldWrapper` -- Field chrome (label, error, status) using plain HTML. Render props: `renderLabel`, `renderError`, `renderStatus` for theming customization
- `ConfirmInputsModal` -- Confirmation dialog using native `<dialog>` with focus trap (Tab wraps, Escape closes, focus restored)
- `FormErrorBoundary` -- Per-field error boundary. Props: `children`, `fallback` (render function receiving error + reset), `onError` callback. Each field is wrapped automatically in the rendering pipeline
- `FormDevTools` -- Collapsible dev-only panel with tabs: Rules, Values, Errors, Graph, Perf, Deps, Timeline

### Wizard
- `WizardForm` -- Multi-step wizard form component with step navigation
- `getVisibleSteps()` -- Filter wizard steps by visibility conditions (uses ICondition)
- `getStepFields()` -- Get visible fields for a step (respects rules engine hidden state)
- `getStepFieldOrder()` -- Get flat field order across all visible steps
- `validateStepFields()` -- Get fields with validation errors in a step
- `isStepValid()` -- Check if a step has no validation errors
- `getStepIndex()` -- Find step index by ID

### Field Arrays
- `FieldArray` -- Repeatable field group component (add/remove/reorder items). Items use full `IFieldConfig`.

### Rules Engine
- `buildDependencyGraph()` -- Build field dependency graph from IFormConfig rules
- `evaluateAllRules()` -- Full initialization: IFormConfig + entity data -> dependency graph + initial runtime state
- `evaluateAffectedFields()` -- Incremental: only re-evaluate transitively affected fields after a change
- `processFieldChange()` -- Trigger rule evaluation for a field value change
- `topologicalSort()` -- Topological sort of dependency graph for evaluation order
- `evaluateCondition()` -- Evaluate an ICondition against current form values (20 operators + AND/OR/NOT)

### Form Helpers
- `GetFieldsToRender()` -- Get ordered list of fields to render
- `CheckFieldValidationRules()` -- Run validation rules for a field
- `ExecuteValueFunction()` -- Execute a single value function
- `normalizeFieldConfig()` -- Normalize deprecated `isReadonly` to `readOnly`

### Validation Registry
- `registerValidators()` -- Register custom validators (unified sync + async + cross-field)
- `getValidator()` -- Look up a validator by name
- `getValidatorRegistry()` -- Get all registered validators
- `runValidations()` -- Run validation rules for a field value
- `createMinLengthValidation()` -- Factory for min-length validator
- `createMaxLengthValidation()` -- Factory for max-length validator
- `createNumericRangeValidation()` -- Factory for numeric range validator
- `createPatternValidation()` -- Factory for regex pattern validator
- `createRequiredIfValidation()` -- Factory for conditional required validator

### Value Function Registry
- `registerValueFunctions()` -- Register custom value functions
- `getValueFunction()` -- Look up a value function by name
- `executeValueFunction()` -- Execute a value function by name

### Config Validation
- `validateFieldConfigs()` -- Validate field configs for missing dependencies, unregistered components, circular deps

### Cycle Detection
- `validateDependencyGraph()` -- Full dependency graph validation with dev-mode warnings (Kahn's algorithm)

### i18n / Locale
- `registerLocale()` -- Register partial or full locale string overrides (merges with defaults)
- `getLocaleString()` -- Get a locale string by key
- `resetLocale()` -- Reset to English defaults
- `getCurrentLocale()` -- Get the full current locale object

### Field Helpers
- `SortOptions()` -- Sort options alphabetically

### Constants
- `FormConstants` -- Form constants (expand cutoff, shimmer config, panel actions, regex patterns)
- `ComponentTypes` -- Component type string keys (Textbox, Dropdown, Toggle, Number, etc.)
- `FIELD_PARENT_PREFIX` -- Prefix for parent field references ("Parent.")
- `FormStrings` -- i18n-aware string literals (getters over LocaleRegistry)

### Types
- `IFormConfig` -- Top-level form config wrapper (version: 2, fields, fieldOrder, wizard, settings)
- `IFormSettings` -- Form-level settings (saveTimeoutMs, maxSaveRetries, etc.)
- `IFieldConfig` -- Primary consumer-facing type defining field configuration shape (v2 schema)
- `IRule` -- Declarative rule (when: ICondition, then: IFieldEffect, else?: IFieldEffect, priority?: number)
- `ICondition` -- Union of IFieldCondition | ILogicalCondition
- `IFieldCondition` -- Single field condition (field, operator, value?)
- `ILogicalCondition` -- Logical composition (operator: "and"|"or"|"not", conditions: ICondition[])
- `IFieldEffect` -- Rule effect (required, hidden, readOnly, type, options, validate, computedValue, order, label)
- `IFieldProps<T>` -- Props contract all injected field components receive via React.cloneElement
- `IOption` -- Option type (`{ value, label, disabled?, group?, icon?, color? }`)
- `IValidationRule` -- Unified validation rule (name, params?, message?, async?, debounceMs?, when?)
- `IRuntimeFieldState` -- Per-field runtime state from rules engine evaluation
- `IRuntimeFormState` -- Full form runtime state (Record<string, IRuntimeFieldState>)
- `IRulesEngineState` -- Top-level rules engine state container
- `IRulesEngineAction` -- Reducer action types
- `RulesEngineActionType` -- Action type enum
- `IFormEngineSharedProps` -- Shared form props (entity IDs, program name, config name, etc.)
- `IConfirmInputModalProps` -- Confirm modal state
- `IFieldToRender` -- Field render instruction
- `IWizardConfig` / `IWizardStep` -- Wizard configuration types (visibleWhen uses ICondition)
- `ILocaleStrings` / `ICoreLocaleStrings` -- Localizable string keys (~50 keys)
- `IAnalyticsCallbacks` -- Analytics/telemetry callback interface (8 event hooks)
- `ICycleError` -- Cycle detection error type
- `IConfigValidationError` -- Config validation error type
- `ValidatorFn` -- Unified validation function signature
- `ValueFunction` -- Value function signature
- `IDraftPersistenceOptions` -- useDraftPersistence options
- `IDraftState` -- Stored draft state shape
- `IUseDraftPersistenceResult` -- useDraftPersistence return type
- `IJsonSchema` -- JSON Schema root type for jsonSchemaToFieldConfig
- `IJsonSchemaProperty` -- JSON Schema property type

### Hooks
- `useDraftPersistence(options)` -- Auto-save form state to localStorage on interval, recover draft on mount, clear after server save. Options: `formId` (string), `data` (form values), `saveIntervalMs` (number), `enabled` (boolean), `storageKeyPrefix` (string). Returns: `{ hasDraft, draftData, clearDraft, lastSavedAt }`
- `useBeforeUnload(shouldWarn, message?)` -- Browser warning on page leave with unsaved changes
- `useFormAnalytics(callbacks)` -- Analytics callback wrapper hook. Accepts `IAnalyticsCallbacks`, returns `IFormAnalytics`

### Form State Serialization
- `serializeFormState(data)` -- Date-safe JSON serialization (converts Date objects to tagged strings)
- `deserializeFormState(json)` -- Deserialize back, restoring Date objects from tagged strings

### JSON Schema Import
- `jsonSchemaToFieldConfig(schema)` -- Convert JSON Schema to `Record<string, IFieldConfig>`. Maps `type` to component, `enum` to dropdown options, `format` to validations, `required` to field required flag

### Lazy Field Registry
- `createLazyFieldRegistry(imports)` -- Create a field registry using `React.lazy()` for on-demand component loading. Accepts `Record<string, () => Promise<{ default: ComponentType }>>`, returns `Record<string, JSX.Element>`

### Zod Schema Import
- `zodSchemaToFieldConfig(zodSchema)` -- Convert a Zod object schema to `Record<string, IFieldConfig>`. Maps ZodString->Textbox, ZodNumber->Number, ZodBoolean->Toggle, ZodEnum->Dropdown, ZodDate->DateControl, ZodArray->Multiselect. Detects `.email()` and `.url()` checks for automatic validation. No zod dependency required.

### Type-Safe Form Configs
- `defineFormConfig(config)` -- Zero-cost TypeScript utility for type-safe form configuration. Constrains field references in rules to known field keys at compile time.

### Performance Helpers
- `RenderTracker` -- Per-field render count tracking. Used by DevTools Perf tab.
- `EventTimeline` -- Chronological event log. Used by DevTools Timeline tab.

### JSON Schema Files
- `schemas/field-config.schema.json` -- JSON Schema for `IFieldConfig` objects. Reference in JSON files for IDE autocompletion.
- `schemas/wizard-config.schema.json` -- JSON Schema for `IWizardConfig` objects.

### Utilities
- `Dictionary<T>` -- Generic dictionary type alias (`Record<string, T>`)
- `IEntityData` -- Entity data type alias (`Record<string, unknown>`)
- `SubEntityType` -- Sub-entity value union type
- `isEmpty()` / `isNull()` / `isStringEmpty()` -- Null/empty check utilities
- `deepCopy()` -- Deep clone via `structuredClone`

## Code Examples

### Minimal Setup

```tsx
import {
  RulesEngineProvider,
  InjectedFieldProvider,
  FormEngine,
  IFormConfig,
} from "@form-eng/core";
import { createFluentFieldRegistry } from "@form-eng/fluent";

const formConfig: IFormConfig = {
  version: 2,
  fields: {
    title: { type: "Textbox", required: true, label: "Title" },
    status: {
      type: "Dropdown",
      label: "Status",
      options: [
        { value: "draft", label: "Draft" },
        { value: "active", label: "Active" },
      ],
    },
  },
  fieldOrder: ["title", "status"],
};

function MyForm() {
  return (
    <RulesEngineProvider>
      <InjectedFieldProvider injectedFields={createFluentFieldRegistry()}>
        <FormEngine
          programName="myApp"
          configName="myForm"
          formConfig={formConfig}
          entityData={{ title: "Hello", status: "draft" }}
          onSave={(data) => console.log("Saved:", data)}
        />
      </InjectedFieldProvider>
    </RulesEngineProvider>
  );
}
```

### Rules Engine (Declarative Rules)

```tsx
const formConfig: IFormConfig = {
  version: 2,
  fields: {
    country: {
      type: "Dropdown",
      label: "Country",
      options: [
        { value: "US", label: "United States" },
        { value: "CA", label: "Canada" },
      ],
    },
    state: {
      type: "Textbox",
      label: "State",
      hidden: true,
      rules: [
        {
          when: { field: "country", operator: "equals", value: "US" },
          then: { required: true, hidden: false },
          else: { required: false, hidden: true },
          priority: 1,
        },
      ],
    },
  },
  fieldOrder: ["country", "state"],
};
```

### Complex Conditions (AND/OR/NOT)

```tsx
rules: [
  {
    when: {
      operator: "and",
      conditions: [
        { field: "country", operator: "equals", value: "US" },
        { field: "priority", operator: "in", value: ["high", "critical"] },
      ],
    },
    then: { required: true, hidden: false },
  },
]
```

### Validation (Unified Registry)

```tsx
import { registerValidators } from "@form-eng/core";

registerValidators({
  uniqueUsername: async (value, entityData, signal) => {
    const response = await fetch(`/api/check-username?name=${value}`, { signal });
    const result = await response.json();
    return result.taken ? "Username is already taken" : undefined;
  },
});

// In field config:
const formConfig: IFormConfig = {
  version: 2,
  fields: {
    username: {
      type: "Textbox",
      label: "Username",
      validate: [{ name: "uniqueUsername", async: true, debounceMs: 500 }],
    },
  },
};
```

### i18n / Localization

```tsx
import { registerLocale } from "@form-eng/core";

registerLocale({
  saving: "Enregistrement...",
  required: "Obligatoire",
  saveError: "Erreur lors de l'enregistrement",
  thisFieldIsRequired: "Ce champ est obligatoire",
  mustBeAtLeastChars: (min) => `Doit comporter au moins ${min} caracteres`,
});
```

### Wizard Form

```tsx
import { WizardForm, IFormConfig } from "@form-eng/core";

const formConfig: IFormConfig = {
  version: 2,
  fields: {
    title: { type: "Textbox", label: "Title" },
    description: { type: "Textbox", label: "Description" },
    status: { type: "Dropdown", label: "Status", options: [{ value: "draft", label: "Draft" }] },
    priority: { type: "Dropdown", label: "Priority", options: [{ value: "high", label: "High" }, { value: "low", label: "Low" }] },
    tags: { type: "MultiSelect", label: "Tags", options: [{ value: "urgent", label: "Urgent" }] },
  },
  wizard: {
    steps: [
      { id: "basics", title: "Basics", fields: ["title", "description"] },
      { id: "details", title: "Details", fields: ["status", "priority"] },
      {
        id: "advanced",
        title: "Advanced",
        fields: ["tags"],
        visibleWhen: { field: "priority", operator: "in", value: ["high"] },
      },
    ],
    validateOnStepChange: true,
  },
};

<WizardForm
  formConfig={formConfig}
  entityData={entityData}
  renderStepContent={(fields) => <FormFields fields={fields} />}
  renderStepNavigation={({ goNext, goPrev, canGoNext, canGoPrev }) => (
    <div>
      <button disabled={!canGoPrev} onClick={goPrev}>Back</button>
      <button disabled={!canGoNext} onClick={goNext}>Next</button>
    </div>
  )}
/>
```

### Field Arrays

```tsx
const formConfig: IFormConfig = {
  version: 2,
  fields: {
    lineItems: {
      type: "FieldArray",
      label: "Line Items",
      items: {
        description: { type: "Textbox", label: "Description", required: true },
        quantity: { type: "Number", label: "Qty" },
      },
      config: {
        minItems: 1,
        maxItems: 10,
        reorderable: true,
      },
    },
  },
};
```

### Error Boundary

```tsx
import { FormErrorBoundary } from "@form-eng/core";

<FormErrorBoundary
  fallback={(error, resetErrorBoundary) => (
    <div>
      <p>Field crashed: {error.message}</p>
      <button onClick={resetErrorBoundary}>Retry</button>
    </div>
  )}
  onError={(error, errorInfo) => logError(error)}
>
  <MyFieldComponent />
</FormErrorBoundary>
```

### Draft Persistence

```tsx
import {
  useDraftPersistence,
  useBeforeUnload,
  serializeFormState,
  deserializeFormState,
} from "@form-eng/core";

function MyForm() {
  const { hasDraft, draftData, clearDraft } = useDraftPersistence({
    formId: "order-form-123",
    data: formValues,
    saveIntervalMs: 5000,
    enabled: isDirty,
    storageKeyPrefix: "myApp",
  });

  useBeforeUnload(isDirty, "You have unsaved changes.");

  // Manual serialization for custom storage
  const serialized = serializeFormState(formValues);    // Date-safe JSON string
  const restored = deserializeFormState(serialized);     // Dates restored
}
```

### DevTools

```tsx
import { FormDevTools } from "@form-eng/core";

<FormDevTools
  configName="orderForm"
  configRules={rulesEngineState}
  formValues={watch()}
  formErrors={errors}
  dirtyFields={dirtyFields}
  enabled={process.env.NODE_ENV === "development"}
/>
// Tabs: Rules, Values, Errors, Graph, Perf, Deps, Timeline
```

### Analytics

```tsx
import { useFormAnalytics, IAnalyticsCallbacks } from "@form-eng/core";

const callbacks: IAnalyticsCallbacks = {
  onFieldChange: (fieldName, oldValue, newValue) => track("field_change", { fieldName }),
  onSaveStart: () => track("save_start"),
  onSaveSuccess: (duration) => track("save_success", { duration }),
  onSaveError: (error) => track("save_error", { error: error.message }),
};

const analytics = useFormAnalytics(callbacks);
```

### JSON Schema Import

```tsx
import { jsonSchemaToFieldConfig } from "@form-eng/core";

const fieldConfigs = jsonSchemaToFieldConfig({
  type: "object",
  properties: {
    name: { type: "string", minLength: 1 },
    age: { type: "number", minimum: 0, maximum: 150 },
    role: { type: "string", enum: ["admin", "user", "guest"] },
    email: { type: "string", format: "email" },
  },
  required: ["name", "email"],
});
// Maps: string->Textbox, number->Number, enum->Dropdown, format:email->EmailValidation
```

### Lazy Field Registry

```tsx
import { createLazyFieldRegistry } from "@form-eng/core";

const lazyFields = createLazyFieldRegistry({
  Textbox: () => import("./fields/HookTextbox"),
  Dropdown: () => import("./fields/HookDropdown"),
  DateControl: () => import("./fields/HookDateControl"),
});

setInjectedFields(lazyFields);
```

### Zod Schema Import

```tsx
import { zodSchemaToFieldConfig } from "@form-eng/core";
import { z } from "zod";

const UserSchema = z.object({
  name: z.string().min(1),
  age: z.number().min(0),
  email: z.string().email(),
  role: z.enum(["admin", "user", "guest"]),
  startDate: z.date(),
});

const fieldConfigs = zodSchemaToFieldConfig(UserSchema);
// Maps: string->Textbox, number->Number, email->EmailValidation, enum->Dropdown, date->DateControl
```
